name: country-info
description: Look up detailed information about a sovereign country — capital, population, currencies, languages, region, area, timezones, and borders. Only works for countries, NOT states, provinces, or cities. Use for questions like 'what is the capital of Japan', 'population of Brazil', 'what currency does Thailand use', 'what languages are spoken in Switzerland'. The country name is appended to the URL path.

input.description: The country name (e.g. 'japan', 'brazil', 'switzerland'). Just the country name, not a full question. Partial matches work.

output.description: JSON array of matching countries. Each has name (common/official), capital, population, currencies, languages, region, subregion, area (km²), timezones, borders, flags, and more.

usage: country-info japan → capital, population, currencies, languages. Countries only, NOT states or cities.
